(psycopg2.errors.UndefinedColumn) column t.txt does not exist
LINE 6:                 SELECT t.libelle, t.typepsc, t.txt, 
                                                     ^

[SQL: 
            WITH uf AS (
                SELECT ST_GeomFromText(%(wkt)s, 2154) AS geom
            ),
            inter AS (
                SELECT t.libelle, t.typepsc, t.txt, 
                       ST_Intersection(ST_MakeValid(t.geom_2154), uf.geom) AS inter_geom
                FROM argeles.prescriptions_surf t, uf
                WHERE ST_Intersects(t.geom_2154, uf.geom)
                  AND ST_Area(ST_Intersection(ST_MakeValid(t.geom_2154), uf.geom))
                      > 0.01
            ),
            union_area AS (
                SELECT COALESCE(ST_Area(ST_Union(inter_geom)), 0.0) AS uarea
                FROM inter
            )
            SELECT libelle, typepsc, txt, 
                   ST_Area(inter_geom)  AS metric,
                   union_area.uarea     AS total_area
            FROM inter, union_area
        ]
